ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The text string that will trigger link selection.
ast.target: 将触发链接选择的文本字符串。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The text string that will trigger using a header as alias for the inserted link.
ast.target: 将触发使用标题作为插入链接别名的文本字符串。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set this to false if you do not want to get suggestions for existing links to notes that do not exist.
ast.target: 如果您不希望获得指向不存在的笔记的现有链接建议，请将此项设置为 false。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set this to true if you want an easy way to link to notes in the same folder as the active note or in the parent folder. Use './' to link to a note in the same folder as the active note. Use '../' to link to a note in the parent folder of the active note's folder.
ast.target: 如果您希望有一种简单的方法来链接到与活动笔记同文件夹或父文件夹中的笔记，请将此项设置为 true。使用 './' 链接到与活动笔记同文件夹中的笔记。使用 '../' 链接到活动笔记文件夹的父文件夹中的笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The text string that will trigger execution of a Templater template. Leave empty if you don't need the ability to trigger Templater templates
ast.target: 将触发执行 Templater 模板的文本字符串。如果您不需要触发 Templater 模板的功能，请留空

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This template will be the first in the list of templates to select from when triggering Templater template execution
ast.target: 此模板将在触发 Templater 模板执行时可供选择的模板列表中排在第一位

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This template will be the first in the list of templates to select from when triggering QuickAdd template execution
ast.target: 此模板将在触发 QuickAdd 模板执行时可供选择的模板列表中排在第一位

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The text string that will trigger execution of a QuickAdd template. Leave empty if you don't need the ability to trigger QuickAdd templates
ast.target: 将触发执行 QuickAdd 模板的文本字符串。如果您不需要触发 QuickAdd 模板的功能，请留空

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Trigger for using header as alias
ast.target: 使用标题作为别名的触发器

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Suggest existing links to notes that do not exist
ast.target: 建议指向不存在的笔记的现有链接

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 执行 Templater 模板的触发器

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 执行 QuickAdd 模板的触发器

ast.name: setName
ast.source: When should folder suggestions be shown

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 仅显示文件夹的触发器

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: The string can contain multiple symbols such as @@ Avoid using characters / strings you often use while writing or that might be used by Obsidian or by other plugins to trigger actions. Some examples of strings to avoid: "[", "|", "#"
ast.target: 该字符串可以包含多个符号，例如 @@。请避免使用您在写作时经常使用、或可能被 Obsidian 或其他插件用于触发操作的字符/字符串。一些需要避免的字符串示例：\"[\"、\"|\"、\"#\"

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: The string can contain only a single symbol such as !
ast.target: 该字符串只能包含单个符号，例如 !

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Executing templates on existing notes is not supported
ast.target: 不支持在现有笔记上执行模板
